faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Norwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Norwood typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatments needed. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Norwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Norwood residents in the 10467 and 10468 zip codes. Mouse infestations require prompt attention, and our team is ready to respond quickly to prevent the problem from worsening and protect your property.

faqs.question: Why are mouse infestations common in Norwood buildings?
faqs.answer: Norwood's many pre-war apartment buildings and older homes often have small gaps, cracks in foundations, and aging infrastructure that mice exploit for entry. The area's proximity to parks and green spaces, combined with abundant food sources from residential and commercial properties, creates favorable conditions for mouse populations year-round.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a detailed inspection of your Norwood property, identification of entry points and nesting areas, strategic trap and bait placement, exclusion work to seal access points, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We also provide prevention advice to keep mice from returning.
